# SSL_DHE_DSS_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA

**Global Variable**

Session key size conforms to pre-1998 US export restrictions.

## Declaration

```swift
var SSL_DHE_DSS_EXPORT_WITH_DES40_CBC_SHA: SSLCipherSuite { get }
```
